name: order_lookup
description: Look up all orders for a customer by customer ID. Returns order details including product IDs, statuses, and purchase dates.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer (e.g. C-01)

name: user_lookup
description: Retrieve customer information by customer ID. Returns the customer's name and country code.

customer_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer (e.g. C-01)

name: product_lookup
description: Retrieve product information by product ID. Returns the product name, provider, and category.

product_id.description: The unique identifier of the product (e.g. P-001)

name: find_returned_products
description: Find all products that have been returned across all customers. Returns a list of returned orders enriched with product names.

name: process_refund
description: Process a refund for a specific order. Updates the order status to REFUNDED and returns confirmation with product details. Requires both customer_id and product_id to identify the order.

customer_id.description: The customer ID who placed the order (e.g. C-01)

product_id.description: The product ID of the order to refund (e.g. P-001)
